claim: Active memory (JSON files holding context like brainstorm docs or user preferences) significantly improves downstream agent decision-making quality
actionable: Maintain an active memory JSON file; load it into agent prompts at key decision points; automatically update it based on interactions
source_title: Senior Engineer's AI Assistant: Realtime API and AI Agents built to SHIP for you

claim: Real-time APIs with speech-to-speech capabilities enable engineers to direct agents by voice; no typing needed for task delegation
actionable: Use OpenAI Realtime API or similar for voice-in-voice-out agent interactions; enables parallel agent work while you think
source_title: Senior Engineer's AI Assistant: Realtime API and AI Agents built to SHIP for you

claim: Reasoning models paired with specialized agents for scraping, code generation, CSV manipulation enable sub-30-second turnaround on complex engineering tasks
actionable: Decompose engineering workflows into specialized agents (scraper, coder, data-munger); use reasoning models to route tasks
source_title: Senior Engineer's AI Assistant: Realtime API and AI Agents built to SHIP for you

claim: Active memory should be automatically managed by agents over time, growing and pruning itself; manual memory management is unsustainable
actionable: Design agents with memory-update routines that consolidate, archive, or delete stale context automatically
source_title: Senior Engineer's AI Assistant: Realtime API and AI Agents built to SHIP for you

claim: Parallel agent execution (agent working while you think) is more valuable than sequential task completion; design agents for continuous background work
actionable: Structure agent workflows to run independent tasks in background; humans focus on high-level thinking while agents execute
source_title: Senior Engineer's AI Assistant: Realtime API and AI Agents built to SHIP for you
